roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PAROLE PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING//X: DEFENDANT GRADUATES TODAY; IN ABSENTIA/X: ORAL MOTION BY THE PEOPLE TOWITHDRAW AND DISMISS PETITION/X: TO REVOKE PAROLE/MO GRTD/X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
